heading: Tuesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Chance of an early shower or thunderstorm along and west of the Greens. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, mid to upper 50s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light, variable to south, except from the south at 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Showers and thunderstorms likely in far northern New York, chance elsewhere, mainly in the afternoon, except slight chance southeast. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. South winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of an evening shower or thunderstorm, then rain developing in New York after midnight and spreading eastward, reaching the Connecticut valley late. Lows mainly in the mid to upper 50s, some lower 50s northeast, and around 60 in the Champlain Valley. South winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.
